description: Fail-closed contract for opt-in, deterministic, backpressure-aware channel telemetry across asupersync channel primitives.

fail_closed_rules.description: A channel row with live_telemetry_wired=false must render XFAIL, never PASS or LIVE.
reserved_uncommitted_obligations must be reported separately from queued_messages so aborted reserves do not look like delivered data.
Broadcast/watch/session rows must expose receiver health or lag rather than hiding slow receivers behind aggregate backlog.
Reports must avoid payload data, user paths, raw Agent Mail bodies, and nondeterministic ordering.

channel_rows.status_reason: opt-in redacted mpsc telemetry snapshot is wired
core_invariants: queued_messages excludes reserved_uncommitted_obligations
aborted reserve decrements reserved_uncommitted_obligations
send_waiter_count is deterministic under LabRuntime
cancellation_count increments on cancelled reserve, cancelled recv, abort, and permit drop
receiver_health distinguishes open, waiting, value_ready, sender_closed, and receiver_dropped

channel_rows.status_reason: opt-in redacted broadcast telemetry snapshot is wired
core_invariants: lagged_receiver_count is explicit from tracked receiver cursors
receiver_health distinguishes open, waiting, value_ready, lagged, caught_up, sender_closed, and receiver_dropped
broadcast overwrite pressure is reported as receiver lag rather than successful delivery
cancellation_count increments on cancelled reserve, cancelled recv, and dropped pending recv futures

channel_rows.status_reason: opt-in redacted watch telemetry snapshot is wired
core_invariants: latest value visibility is reported as at most one queued change rather than payload data
receiver_health distinguishes open, waiting, changed, unchanged, lagged, sender_closed, and receiver_dropped
lagged_receiver_count is explicit from tracked receiver versions
cancellation_count increments on cancelled changed waits and dropped pending changed futures

channel_rows.status_reason: opt-in redacted oneshot telemetry snapshot is wired
core_invariants: capacity is always one
queued_messages is at most one
reserved_uncommitted_obligations reports outstanding SendPermit state
closed distinguishes sender_drop, receiver_drop, committed, and abort states
cancellation_count increments on cancelled reserve, cancelled recv, abort, and permit drop

channel_rows.status_reason: contracted only; session subchannel telemetry is not wired yet
core_invariants: tracked senders preserve per-session channel ids
subchannel backlog is stable-sorted in reports
cancellation_count includes aborted tracked sends

golden_markdown:
| channel_kind | status | required_pressure_fields |
| --- | --- | --- |
| broadcast | LIVE | queued_messages, reserved_uncommitted_obligations, send_waiter_count, recv_waiter_count, receiver_health, lagged_receiver_count, cancellation_count |
| mpsc | LIVE | queued_messages, reserved_uncommitted_obligations, send_waiter_count, recv_waiter_count, receiver_health, cancellation_count |
| oneshot | LIVE | queued_messages, reserved_uncommitted_obligations, send_waiter_count, recv_waiter_count, receiver_health, cancellation_count |
| session | XFAIL | queued_messages, reserved_uncommitted_obligations, send_waiter_count, recv_waiter_count, receiver_health, lagged_receiver_count, cancellation_count |
| watch | LIVE | queued_messages, reserved_uncommitted_obligations, send_waiter_count, recv_waiter_count, receiver_health, lagged_receiver_count, cancellation_count |
proof_commands: rch exec -- env CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_channel_telemetry_contract CARGO_PROFILE_TEST_DEBUG=0 RUSTFLAGS='-C debuginfo=0' cargo test -p asupersync --test channel_telemetry_contract -- --nocapture
